title: Deliciously Citrusy Irish Lamb Paella
description: A festive and citrusy Irish dish featuring lamb, Thai green curry paste, and tempering chocolate, made in a traditional paella pan, following ayurvedic sattvic friendly principles.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a paella pan over medium high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the Thai green curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the lemon juice, orange zest, saffron threads, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the arborio rice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid is absorbed.
Melt the tempering chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 10 second increments, stirring between each interval.
Stir the melted chocolate into the paella and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
